title: RISD Siva Nataraja.JPG
description:
Statuette of Nataraja, The Lord of Dance. Nataraja is a depiction of the god Shiva as the cosmic dancer who performs his and divine dance to destroy a weary universe and make preparations for the god Brahma to start the process of creation.

South Indian, Tamil Nadu, Vijayanagar period (14th - 16th century). Bronze lost wax process.

Museum Appropriations Fund 33.026
